# Swamp Ruins

## Theme

Ancient ruins swallowed by a toxic swamp.

Everything here is wet, rotten and poisonous.

## Biome Gameplay

Swamp Ruins teaches:

- avoiding poison pools
- dealing with slow terrain
- fighting enemies that punish standing still
- prioritizing dangerous poison casters

Rule:
Swamp enemies use poison, slime and mud to control space.

---

# Slime

## Role
Living Hazard

## Difficulty
Easy

## Basic Attack
Acid Touch

## Ability
Split

On death, leaves a small poison puddle.

Effect:
- poison damage over time
- lasts 4 seconds

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Move / Hop
- Attack
- Death / Split

---

# Swamp Creature

## Role
Heavy Bruiser

## Difficulty
Medium

## Basic Attack
Mud Slam

## Ability
Mud Charge

Rushes forward slowly but heavily.

Effects:
- medium damage
- knockback
- leaves mud trail that slows player

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Charge
- Slam
- Death

---

# Poison Frog

## Role
Ranged Harasser

## Difficulty
Medium

## Basic Attack
Poison Spit

## Ability
Toxic Leap

Jumps to a new position and leaves a poison splash on landing.

Cooldown:
7 seconds.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Hop / Move
- Spit
- Leap
- Death

---

# Swamp Hag

## Role
Biome Boss

## Difficulty
Boss

## Basic Attack
Poison Bolt

## Ability 1
Toxic Pool

Creates several poison pools.

## Ability 2
Summon Slimes

Summons 2–3 Slimes.

## Ability 3
Bog Curse

Marks the player.

After delay, mud erupts under them.

Effects:
- damage
- slow

## Phase 2
Triggered at 50% HP.

- poison pools last longer
- summons Poison Frogs

## Phase 3
Triggered at 25% HP.

- casts faster
- arena slowly fills with toxic mud
- Bog Curse appears more often

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Cast
- Summon
- Roar
- Death

## VFX
- poison puddles
- green bubbles
- mud splash
- toxic fog
- swamp runes

## SFX
- bubbling slime
- frog croak
- mud impact
- hag chant
